_notes: Ready-to-use JSON-LD templates. Replace {{SITE_URL}} with the final production URL (e.g. https://www.theofficial.ai). Replace placeholders in {{DOUBLE_BRACES}} with real values before shipping.
_usage: Each template is keyed by the page it belongs on. Embed via <script type="application/ld+json"> in the server-rendered HTML (prefer SSR over client-side injection per Google's Dec 2025 JS SEO guidance).

homepage_only_software_application._comment: Emit ONLY on the homepage. Remove the aggregateRating field until you have real, verifiable reviews — fabricated ratings violate Google's review-snippet policy.
homepage_only_software_application.name: Official AI
homepage_only_software_application.description: AI-powered video content creation platform. Upload photos, get studio-quality social media videos with your face and voice. No filming required.

pricing_product._comment: Use on /pricing. Replace the offers array with real plan data from src/app/pricing/PricingClient.tsx.
pricing_product.name: Official AI
pricing_product.description: One plan, everything included. $79/mo for 30 videos, all platforms, voice cloning, analytics, and auto-posting.

feature_detail_software._comment: Use on each /features/[slug]. Replace {{FEATURE_NAME}} and {{FEATURE_DESCRIPTION}} per feature.
feature_detail_software.name: {{FEATURE_NAME}} — Official AI

about_page._comment: Use on /about. Fill the Person array with real founders/team.
about_page.name: About Official AI

tools_webapplication_template._comment: Use on each /tools/[tool]. Replace placeholders per tool (speaking-time-calculator, video-roi-calculator, hook-generator).
tools_webapplication_template.name: {{TOOL_NAME}}

compare_product_vs._comment: Use on each /compare/[slug]. Subject = Official AI. Replace {{COMPETITOR_NAME}}.
compare_product_vs.name: Official AI vs {{COMPETITOR_NAME}}
compare_product_vs.description: Feature-by-feature comparison of Official AI and {{COMPETITOR_NAME}} for AI video creation.

blog_index_itemlist._comment: Use on /blog. Populate itemListElement from src/data/blog-posts.ts in order.
blog_index_itemlist.name: Official AI Blog
blog_index_itemlist.description: Insights on AI video generation, content strategy, and how professionals are using AI to build their brands.

blog_post_article_fixed._comment: Corrected Article template. Matches what BlogPostTemplate emits today, but with production domain and real logo.
blog_post_article_fixed.headline: {{POST_TITLE}}

industry_service_fixed._comment: Corrected Service schema for /for/[industry]. Use on advisors, attorneys, doctors, realtors. Swap hardcoded provider.url to production domain.
industry_service_fixed.name: Official AI for {{INDUSTRY_LABEL}}
